title: Crunchy Show-off Algerian Chinese Leaf Stir-fry
description: A show-off culinary dish featuring crunchy and herbal flavors with a touch of sauteed raw-friendly elements for an Algerian-Chinese fusion.
instructions: Wash and dry Chinese Leaf. Cut into bite-sized pieces.
In a large skillet or wok, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add garlic, chili pepper, paprika, salt, and pepper. Cook for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add chopped Chinese Leaf to the skillet. Toss well with the cooking liquid from the skillet so that it starts wilting slightly but not fully.
Drizzle lemon juice over the leaf mix to prevent burning while continuing to stir-fry for another minute. Add red pepper flakes just before serving, adjusting seasoning as necessary.
